DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CLERK: G.SHULL. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. ORAL EVIDENCE PRESENTED. DEFT MOT FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. PLTFF MOT FOR DIRECTED VERDICT UNDER SUBMISSION. COURT INVITES PARTIES TO SUBMIT PREPARED JUDGMENTS. CASE STANDS SUBMITTED. COURT RULES FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DFT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES, BACK RENT & DAMAGES AND COSTS. COURT SIGNS JUDGMNT SUBMITTED BY PLTFF.
